body:
## Goal
Add data for 3 mid-tier brand+series pages (prog and tech-death clusters). Depends on #2403 (scaffold) being live.

## Pages
| URL | Title | Roster drummers |
|---|---|---|
| `/gear/gretsch/usa-custom/drummers-using` | Gretsch USA Custom Drummers | Matt Garstka (Animals as Leaders), others |
| `/gear/sonor/sq2/drummers-using` | Sonor SQ2 Drummers | Gene Hoglan, Tomas Haake (Meshuggah) |
| `/gear/mapex/armory/drummers-using` | Mapex Armory Drummers | roster members |

## Action
1. Add 3 entries to `drummersByKit.js` (Gretsch USA Custom, Sonor SQ2, Mapex Armory) with all available drummer data from existing profile pages.
2. Create `/public/llms/gear-comparison/drummers-using-gretsch-usa-custom.md`
3. Create `/public/llms/gear-comparison/drummers-using-sonor-sq2.md`
4. Create `/public/llms/gear-comparison/drummers-using-mapex-armory.md`
Each LLM file: ≥300 words, drummer list with band/era/config, FAQ block with ≥3 Q&A.

## Verify
- All 3 routes return 200 with correct SSR meta
- LLM files accessible
- Each page has ≥300 words, correct JSON-LD schemas, internal links to drummer profiles

## Done
3 pages live; 3 LLM files at /public/llms/gear-comparison/.

_Split 3/4 of #2215. Depends on: #2403 (scaffold)._
title: feat(seo): /gear/drummers-using — mid-tier pages: Gretsch USA Custom + Sonor SQ2 + Mapex Armory (split 3/4 of #2215)
